source: Aptabase release exports only; public archive excludes session and user identifiers.
note: Observed session span is the period between the first and last event, not continuous foreground usage.
coverage_note: Within-month coverage is discontinuous after 2026-03-16, 2026-04-09, 2026-05-19, and 2026-06-19. Do not use the export for monthly adoption trends.
row_identity_note: The export has no event ID and contains fully identical rows, so batch-expanded estimates and extreme sessions cannot all be asserted as independent work.
